title: Develop climate risk management strategies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop climate risk management strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review climate and enterprise data

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret historical climate data, including any natural disasters, from a range of sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret historical climate data, including any natural disasters, from a range of sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret historical climate data, including any natural disasters, from a range of sources.

pcs.text: Identify weather and climate risk factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify weather and climate risk factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify weather and climate risk factors.

pcs.text: Collect information on normal and significant climate events and their impact on natural and rural systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information on normal and significant climate events and their impact on natural and rural systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information on normal and significant climate events and their impact on natural and rural systems.

pcs.text: Detail current and historical property and enterprise production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Detail current and historical property and enterprise production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Detail current and historical property and enterprise production.

pcs.text: Review short and long term enterprise goals to ensure they fit within climatic constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review short and long term enterprise goals to ensure they fit within climatic constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review short and long term enterprise goals to ensure they fit within climatic constraints.

pcs.text: Source, present and update climate and enterprise data according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source, present and update climate and enterprise data according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source, present and update climate and enterprise data according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Review climate and enterprise data

elements.title: Identify and analyse climate risks and opportunities

pcs.text: Analyse forecasted changes of seasonal climate for the enterprise region
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse forecasted changes of seasonal climate for the enterprise region?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse forecasted changes of seasonal climate for the enterprise region.

pcs.text: Identify climate risks and opportunities for the site and enterprise region
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify climate risks and opportunities for the site and enterprise region?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify climate risks and opportunities for the site and enterprise region.

pcs.text: Determine impact on production of different weather and climate risk factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine impact on production of different weather and climate risk factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine impact on production of different weather and climate risk factors.

pcs.text: Use qualitative and quantitative techniques to analyse risks and opportunities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use qualitative and quantitative techniques to analyse risks and opportunities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use qualitative and quantitative techniques to analyse risks and opportunities.

pcs.text: Evaluate importance of climate variability and significant climate events
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate importance of climate variability and significant climate events?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate importance of climate variability and significant climate events.

pcs.text: Outline tactics to address a range of different climate variability risks and opportunities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline tactics to address a range of different climate variability risks and opportunities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline tactics to address a range of different climate variability risks and opportunities.

pcs.text: Identify contingency options for enterprises and the business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify contingency options for enterprises and the business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify contingency options for enterprises and the business.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and analyse climate risks and opportunities

elements.title: Prepare climate risk management strategies

pcs.text: Analyse climate variability and seasonal climate forecasts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse climate variability and seasonal climate forecasts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse climate variability and seasonal climate forecasts.

pcs.text: Predict the impact of climate variability on the environment, property value and equity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Predict the impact of climate variability on the environment, property value and equity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Predict the impact of climate variability on the environment, property value and equity.

pcs.text: Identify business strategies that address major climate risk factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify business strategies that address major climate risk factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify business strategies that address major climate risk factors.

pcs.text: Identify business strategies that include consideration of insurance to cover loss in the event of significant or unusual climate activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify business strategies that include consideration of insurance to cover loss in the event of significant or unusual climate activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify business strategies that include consideration of insurance to cover loss in the event of significant or unusual climate activity.

pcs.text: Prepare financial forecasts for all strategies according to enterprise guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare financial forecasts for all strategies according to enterprise guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare financial forecasts for all strategies according to enterprise guidelines.

pcs.text: Review preferred production, enterprise or alternative strategies and select options appropriate for the enterprise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review preferred production, enterprise or alternative strategies and select options appropriate for the enterprise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review preferred production, enterprise or alternative strategies and select options appropriate for the enterprise.

pcs.text: Document and present strategies to manage risks associated with variable climate to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and present strategies to manage risks associated with variable climate to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and present strategies to manage risks associated with variable climate to stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare climate risk management strategies

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
